title: erigeron compositus var. breviradiatus
intro: Erigeron compositus var. breviradiatus, also known as Fleabane, is a plant species that belongs to the sunflower family and is native to western North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Erigeron compositus var. breviradiatus include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as a digestive aid and anti-diarrheal agent. Erigeron compositus var. breviradiatus can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional herbal remedies.
